title: Provider–Observer–Operator: A Role-Based Abstraction Discipline for Interface-Led Architecture
description: This technical note defines Provider–Observer–Operator as a role-based abstraction discipline for applying Interface-Led Architecture (ILA) to concrete software design and refactoring. It classifies interface-bearing components into Provider, Observer, and Operator roles; defines Units as governed compositions of roles; connects Units through Pipelines under Core Contracts; and clarifies that exceptions are failure states rather than roles. The English manuscript is the canonical version and the Japanese manuscript is included as a companion translation.
